subcodes.first_line: The mention of God is as a leaf among His leaves, and verily His remembrance hath preceded all created things; were it not for His remembrance, none would have known Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر الله ورقه من اوراقه و ان ذکره سبق العالمین و لو لا ذکره ماعرفه احد
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @consolation and comfort, @Primal Will and the Word; Remembrance; Manifestation of God, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
